Table summary.
File name: source-materials/prior-proposals/finance/July 20th, 2025 budget meeting handout.pdf. Type of document: Budget meeting handout. Purpose: Source for prior finance/budget discussion.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Congregation. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: What decisions or assumptions from this handout remain current?.
File name: source-materials/prior-proposals/treasurer/KBC Treasurer - Alternative Proposal 010926.pdf. Type of document: Treasurer proposal. Purpose: Source for alternative Treasurer structure or transition idea.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Treasurer, Nominating Committee. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Which proposal elements should be carried into the new structure?.
File name: source-materials/prior-proposals/personnel/1_Bivocational Adjustment Plan.docx. Type of document: Personnel proposal / adjustment plan. Purpose: Source for personnel adjustment approach.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Does this affect compensation, staffing, or finance operations?.

Purpose: Source for Personnel Committee process and responsibilities.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Is this approved and current?.

Purpose: Source PDF version of Personnel Committee process and responsibilities.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Which operating guide version is authoritative?.
File name: source-materials/prior-proposals/personnel/KBC_Personnel_Committee_Overview_and_YA_Proposal_Oct2025.pptx. Type of document: Presentation / proposal. Purpose: Source for personnel committee overview and Young Adult proposal context.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Deacons, Congregation if presented. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Does any content affect finance operations, or is it broader personnel history?.
File name: source-materials/prior-proposals/miller-management/Conversion Information Sheet - fillable.pdf. Type of document: Conversion information sheet. Purpose: Source for accounting conversion details.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: What data and setup details would be needed if using Miller Management or QuickBooks?.

Open questions: Is this proposal still active, current, and cost-appropriate?.
